misc.title: #ONEPIECE1188 I hope Oda eventually shows us Loki's version of Hakoku/Hakai; with Ragnir, that could turn into an insanely powerful attack. I’d also really love it if Oda highlighted the mechanics beh
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1188 I hope Oda eventually shows us Loki's version of Hakoku/Hakai; with Ragnir, that could turn into an insanely powerful attack. I’d also really love it if Oda highlighted the mechanics behind the attack(just like he did with the background of Ryou back in Wano).

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1188 Loki is better in AP, Endurance, Physical power, Stamina and durability. Luffy is faster and better skilled in Haki. Also his devilfruit should be little higher. Overall two monsters, bo
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1188 Loki is better in AP, Endurance, Physical power, Stamina and durability. Luffy is faster and better skilled in Haki. Also his devilfruit should be little higher. Overall two monsters, both had the world strongest opponent against them... Southpaw D. Yonko (@SouthpawDloki) Prince Loki had the Best performance against Imu on Elbaph🔥🔥🔥 #ONEPIECE1188 #FEARLOKI — https://nitter.net/SouthpawDloki/status/2076088943448134091#m
